tasks.subject: Task 0: i18n Keys for All Three Features
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add all new translation keys upfront so subsequent tasks can reference them.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/i18n/locales/*/message.json` (8 files)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All 8 locales have keys: editedAt, editSave, editCancel, editHint, deleteConfirmTitle, deleteConfirmDescription, deleteConfirm, deleteCancel
- Key editedAt uses interpolation: (edited at {{time}})

**Verify:** `pnpm build:client` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/i18n/locales/en/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh-TW/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/ja/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/ko/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/de/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/es/message.json", "apps/client/src/i18n/locales/fr/message.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 8 locales have new keys", "editedAt uses interpolation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Pin/Unpin Hooks with Optimistic Updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create usePinMessage and useUnpinMessage hooks with optimistic cache updates, wire into MessageList.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useMessages.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageList.tsx`
- Test: `apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/usePinMessage.test.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm jest --testPathPattern=usePinMessage`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/hooks/useMessages.ts", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageList.tsx", "apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/usePinMessage.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm jest --testPathPattern=usePinMessage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["usePinMessage optimistically sets isPinned: true", "useUnpinMessage optimistically sets isPinned: false", "Error rollback works", "handlePin calls correct hook"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Delete Confirmation Dialog + Admin Permissions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add confirmation dialog for all message deletions, allow channel admins/owners to delete others' messages.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/client/src/components/channel/DeleteMessageDialog.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContextMenu.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageItem.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageList.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts`
- Test: `apps/client/src/components/channel/__tests__/DeleteMessageDialog.test.tsx`

**Verify:** `pnpm jest --testPathPattern="DeleteMessageDialog|messages.service"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/DeleteMessageDialog.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContextMenu.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageItem.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageList.tsx", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm jest --testPathPattern=DeleteMessageDialog", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AlertDialog opens on delete click", "Confirm triggers deletion", "Cancel closes dialog", "Admin sees delete on others messages", "Backend allows admin/owner delete"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Inline Message Editing with Lexical Editor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the edit stub with an inline Lexical editor that back-fills original HTML, saves via useUpdateMessage, shows edited timestamp.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/editor/RichTextEditor.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageItem.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageList.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/lib/date-utils.ts`

**Verify:** Manual test: right-click → Edit → content loads → Enter saves → edited timestamp appears

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/editor/RichTextEditor.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageItem.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageList.tsx", "apps/client/src/lib/date-utils.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Edit replaces content with Lexical editor", "HTML back-fill preserves mentions and code blocks", "Enter saves, Esc cancels", "Edited timestamp shows with time", "Only one message in edit mode at a time"]}
```
